CH_ISComfortable.comment:
0b : consider climate comfotable for idle stop permition judgement
1b : no consider climate comfotable for idle stop permition judgement

CH_ISFandown.comment:
0b : FAN voltage down for idle stop time duration
1b : no FAN voltage down for idle stop

CH_ISIntake.comment:
0b : permit intake change to REC for idle stop time duration
1b : no intake change for idle stop

lists.1: No failure and HV PTC OFF

OH_HVPTC_FaultType.comment:
0d: No failure and HV PTC ON
1d: 
No failure and HV PTC OFF
2d: 
Downgraded mode for HV PTC
3d: 
Failure mode for HV PTC

4d: To Change HV PTC

5d-6d: Not used
7d: 
Unavailable

OLB_IgnitionState.comment:

0h: No MMI activation request (**)

(**): Definition related to OH_ClimMMIActivationRequest use.
